tests.name: Block click/tap removes block
tests.detail: Mouse click detected, block disappears with dust particle

tests.name: Stability recalculated after removal
tests.detail: Wobble triggers on low-stability blocks correctly

tests.name: Collapse cascade triggers on instability < 15
tests.detail: 0.6s delay then collapse animation fires

tests.name: Win condition (all targets removed)
tests.detail: Game enters WIN state when all yellow blocks removed

tests.name: Fail condition (tower topples)
tests.detail: Blocks fall with velocity, animals wake up

tests.name: 3-star scoring (moves vs par)
tests.detail: Par-based stars calculated correctly; saved to localStorage

tests.name: Level select shows correct stars
tests.detail: Stars per level loaded from localStorage and displayed

tests.name: Level unlock progression
tests.detail: Next level unlocked on win, locked levels show 🔒

tests.name: Wobble animation on unstable blocks
tests.detail: sin() oscillation visible on blocks below stability threshold

tests.name: Falling blocks apply velocity
tests.detail: velY/velX applied per frame on collapse; blocks fall off screen

tests.name: Target block glow pulses
tests.detail: Golden pulse sin() animation visible on target blocks

tests.name: Hover stability preview (green/yellow/red)
tests.detail: Colour tint correctly indicates removal risk level

tests.name: Title screen renders
tests.detail: Tower, sleeping cat, title text, blinking TAP TO START visible

tests.name: Level select grid (2 rows of 5)
tests.detail: All 10 levels rendered, stars shown, locked levels greyed

tests.name: Pixel animals render (cat/bunny/dog)
tests.detail: All 3 animal types draw correctly with awake/sleeping state

tests.name: Zzz bubble animation
tests.detail: Floating z characters animate on sleeping animals

tests.name: Wood grain on blocks
tests.detail: Vertical grain lines visible; warm brown palette consistent

tests.name: Dust particles on block removal
tests.detail: LittleJS ParticleEmitter triggers on each removed block

tests.name: Sky/ground background
tests.detail: Gradient sky, green ground with grass detail strips

tests.name: SDK initializes
tests.detail: No errors in console

tests.name: 10 levels minimum
tests.detail: Exactly 10 levels present

tests.name: Mobile touch works
tests.detail: mouseWasPressed(0) covers both click and touch

issuesFound.issue: Stability model is simplified (center-of-mass estimate) — extreme overhang positions may not trigger collapse visually even though they should
issuesFound.recommendation: Acceptable for hypercasual; levels designed around the model so edge cases are avoided

conclusion: Tower Collapse is APPROVED FOR SHIPPING. All 10 levels functional, pixel art animals charming and distinct, block removal physics satisfying. CrazyGames compliant. Strong candidate for reflexion cycle to add juice (screen shake, level transitions).
